# MYOUKEE — Complete AI Karaoke Platform Documentation

> MYOUKEE (myoukee.com) is a full-featured AI-powered karaoke platform. It uses deep learning to remove vocals from any song, transcribe lyrics with word-level timing, and generate professional karaoke videos — all automatically. The platform supports 14 languages and is available as a web app and mobile app (iOS/Android).

---

## What is MYOUKEE?

MYOUKEE is an online karaoke maker that lets anyone turn any song into karaoke. Users upload an audio file (MP3, WAV, FLAC, etc.), a video file (MP4, WebM, etc.), or paste a YouTube link. The AI then:

1. **Separates vocals from instrumentals** using deep learning models
2. **Transcribes the lyrics** with word-level timestamps
3. **Generates a karaoke video** with synchronized scrolling lyrics

The entire process takes about 2-5 minutes per song. Users can then sing along, record their performance, get an AI singing score, and share with friends.

---

## Detailed Feature List

### 1. AI Vocal Remover
Remove vocals from any song using state-of-the-art AI. The deep learning model separates the vocal track from the instrumental, producing a clean backing track suitable for karaoke singing. Works with any genre — pop, rock, hip-hop, R&B, classical, K-pop, J-pop, Latin, Arabic music, and more.

**Use cases:**
- Create karaoke versions of any song
- Practice singing with professional backing tracks
- Create instrumental versions for DJs and content creators
- Extract acapella vocals for remixing

### 2. Karaoke from Any Song
Upload any audio or video file and get a complete karaoke experience. The AI handles everything:
- Vocal removal to create the backing track
- Lyrics transcription with automatic language detection
- Word-level timing synchronization
- Video generation with animated lyrics display

**Supported input formats:** MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A, AAC, MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI, MKV

### 3. YouTube to Karaoke
Paste any YouTube URL and instantly convert the video into a karaoke version. No need to download the video first — MYOUKEE handles everything automatically. Perfect for:
- Converting music videos to karaoke
- Creating karaoke from live performances
- Making karaoke versions of trending songs

### 4. Lyrics Sync (AI Transcription)
AI-powered lyrics transcription with word-level timing accuracy. Features include:
- Automatic language detection for 14 languages
- Word-level timestamp precision (not just line-by-line)
- Built-in transcript editor for manual corrections
- Support for RTL languages (Hebrew, Arabic)

### 5. Singing Score (AI Performance Analysis)
Real-time AI analysis of singing performances:
- Pitch accuracy scoring
- Timing precision analysis
- Overall performance rating
- Comparison with other singers on the leaderboard

### 6. AI Vocal Coach
Personalized singing improvement powered by AI:
- Performance-specific tips after each song
- Progress tracking over time with charts
- Pitch and timing trend analysis
- Actionable feedback to improve vocal skills

### 7. Background Changer
Customize the visual appearance of karaoke videos:
- Multiple built-in themes: Aurora, Neon, Sunset, Ocean, Galaxy, Forest, and more
- Upload your own image as a custom background
- Preview backgrounds before applying
- Re-render video with new background without re-processing audio

### 8. Party Mode (Multiplayer Karaoke)
Host karaoke parties with friends, online or in-person:
- **Create a room** with a unique 6-digit join code
- **Singing modes:** Solo, Duet, Battle
- **Song queue management:** Add songs from uploads, YouTube, or processed library
- **TV Display mode:** Dedicated full-screen view optimized for big screens/TVs
- **Room leaderboard:** Track scores within the party
- **Real-time sync:** All participants see the same content simultaneously

### 9. Social Feed
A social network for karaoke lovers:
- **Discover tab:** Browse public performances from all users
- **Feed tab:** See performances from users you follow
- **Like** and **comment** on performances
- **Follow/unfollow** other singers
- **User profiles** with performance history and social stats

### 10. Weekly Challenges
Competitive singing challenges:
- New challenge every week with a specific song
- Submit your performance to compete
- Real-time leaderboard ranking
- Credit prizes for top performers
- View past challenges and winners

### 11. XP & Badges (Gamification)
Engagement and achievement system:
- Earn XP for singing, sharing, and social interactions
- Level up as you accumulate XP
- Unlock badges for specific achievements
- Daily streak tracking
- Global XP leaderboard (all-time and weekly)

### 12. Global Leaderboard
Rankings based on:
- Singing scores (pitch and timing accuracy)
- XP accumulation
- Challenge performance

### 13. Referral Program
Invite friends and earn rewards:
- Personal referral link
- Track successful referrals
- Earn credits when friends sign up and use the platform

### 14. Recording Library
Manage your singing recordings:
- Save recordings from Sing Mode
- Play back your performances
- Publish/unpublish to make performances public or private
- Track your improvement over time

---

## Supported Languages (14)

| Language | Code | Native Name | RTL | Karaoke Page |
|----------|------|-------------|-----|--------------|
| English | en | English | No | — |
| Hebrew | he | עברית | Yes | /features/hebrew-karaoke |
| Arabic | ar | العربية | Yes | /features/arabic-karaoke |
| Russian | ru | Русский | No | /features/russian-karaoke |
| Spanish | es | Español | No | /features/spanish-karaoke |
| French | fr | Français | No | /features/french-karaoke |
| German | de | Deutsch | No | /features/german-karaoke |
| Japanese | ja | 日本語 | No | /features/japanese-karaoke |
| Chinese | zh | 中文 | No | /features/chinese-karaoke |
| Korean | ko | 한국어 | No | /features/korean-karaoke |
| Thai | th | ไทย | No | /features/thai-karaoke |
| Vietnamese | vi | Tiếng Việt | No | /features/vietnamese-karaoke |
| Filipino | tl | Filipino | No | /features/filipino-karaoke |
| Indonesian | id | Bahasa Indonesia | No | /features/indonesian-karaoke |

The entire user interface is translated into all 14 languages. Lyrics transcription supports all languages with automatic detection. RTL (right-to-left) layout is fully supported for Hebrew and Arabic.

---

## Pricing

MYOUKEE uses a credit-based pricing model with no subscriptions or monthly fees. You only pay for what you use.

| Package | Credits | Price (USD) | Per Credit |
|---------|---------|-------------|------------|
| Starter | 10 | $4.99 | $0.50 |
| Popular | 40 | $14.99 | $0.37 |
| Pro | 120 | $34.99 | $0.29 |
| Studio | 500 | $99.99 | $0.20 |

**Payment methods:** Stripe (credit/debit cards) and PayPal.

Each song processing typically costs 1 credit. Additional features like background changes may cost additional credits.

---

## How It Works

1. **Upload** — Upload an audio/video file or paste a YouTube link
2. **AI Processing** — The AI separates vocals, transcribes lyrics, and generates the karaoke video (2-5 minutes)
3. **Review** — Optionally edit the transcribed lyrics and timing
4. **Sing** — Sing along with the karaoke video and get scored
5. **Share** — Share your performances on the social feed or via direct link

---

## Platform Availability

- **Web App:** https://myoukee.com (works on all modern browsers)
- **Mobile App:** Available for iOS and Android (built with React Native/Expo)
- **PWA:** Installable as a Progressive Web App on mobile and desktop

---

## Comparisons

### MYOUKEE vs. traditional karaoke apps
- **Any song:** Unlike traditional karaoke apps with limited song libraries, MYOUKEE works with ANY song
- **AI-powered:** Real-time vocal removal and lyrics sync, not pre-made tracks
- **Multilingual:** 14 languages with native UI support, not just English
- **Social:** Built-in social features, challenges, and leaderboards
- **Party Mode:** Multiplayer rooms with duet and battle modes

### MYOUKEE vs. vocal remover tools
- **Complete solution:** Not just vocal removal — full karaoke video generation with lyrics
- **Sing Mode:** Built-in singing experience with scoring
- **Social platform:** Share and discover performances

---

## Use Cases

1. **Home karaoke** — Turn your living room into a karaoke bar
2. **Karaoke parties** — Host multiplayer karaoke events with Party Mode
3. **Singing practice** — Use AI Vocal Coach to improve your skills
4. **Content creation** — Create karaoke versions for YouTube, TikTok, etc.
5. **Music education** — Practice pitch and timing with AI scoring
6. **DJ/Producer** — Extract instrumentals and vocals for remixing
7. **Language learning** — Sing along in different languages with synced lyrics
8. **Team building** — Virtual karaoke events for remote teams

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is MYOUKEE?**
A: MYOUKEE is an AI-powered karaoke platform that turns any song into karaoke. Upload a song or paste a YouTube link, and the AI removes vocals, transcribes lyrics, and generates a karaoke video automatically.

**Q: How does MYOUKEE work?**
A: Upload an audio/video file or paste a YouTube link. The AI separates vocals from instrumentals, transcribes lyrics with word-level timing, and generates a professional karaoke video in 2-5 minutes.

**Q: What languages does MYOUKEE support?**
A: MYOUKEE supports 14 languages: English, Hebrew, Arabic, Russian, Spanish, French, German, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Thai, Vietnamese, Filipino, and Indonesian. The UI is fully translated and lyrics transcription supports all languages.

**Q: Is MYOUKEE free?**
A: MYOUKEE uses a credit-based system. You purchase credits to process songs. Packages start at $4.99 for 10 credits. There are no subscriptions or monthly fees.

**Q: Can I use any song?**
A: Yes! MYOUKEE works with any song in any language. Upload an audio file (MP3, WAV, etc.), a video file (MP4, etc.), or paste a YouTube link.

**Q: What is Party Mode?**
A: Party Mode lets you create multiplayer karaoke rooms. Share a 6-digit code with friends to join. Supports Solo, Duet, and Battle singing modes with a TV Display option for big screens.

**Q: How accurate is the AI vocal removal?**
A: MYOUKEE uses state-of-the-art deep learning models for vocal separation. The quality is excellent for most songs across all genres.

**Q: Can I edit the lyrics after AI transcription?**
A: Yes! MYOUKEE includes a built-in transcript editor where you can correct lyrics and adjust word timing before generating the final karaoke video.

**Q: What is the AI Vocal Coach?**
A: The AI Vocal Coach analyzes your singing performances and provides personalized tips for improvement. It tracks your progress over time, showing trends in pitch accuracy and timing.

**Q: Is there a mobile app?**
A: Yes, MYOUKEE is available as a mobile app for iOS and Android, as well as a Progressive Web App (PWA) that can be installed on any device.

**Q: How do Weekly Challenges work?**
A: Each week there's a new song challenge. Record your performance of that song and compete against other users on the leaderboard. Top performers win credit prizes.

**Q: Can I share my karaoke creations?**
A: Yes! You can share karaoke videos via a public link, publish performances to the social feed, or share directly with friends.
